mapper.select: SELECT TICKET_ID, CLUSTER_NO, TICKET_TYPE, TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, FAULT_TIME, ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE, ROOT_CAUSE_CODE, ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN, TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT, STATUS, TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE, TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE, TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE, PARENT_TICKET_ID, TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, OCCUR FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_CURRENT WHERE TICKET_GENERATION_TIME > RCA.FC_GET_MINUS_DAY(4) AND TICKET_ID = #{ticketId}

SELECT TICKET_ID, CLUSTER_NO, TICKET_TYPE, TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, FAULT_TIME, ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE, ROOT_CAUSE_CODE, ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN, TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT, STATUS, TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE, TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE, TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE, PARENT_TICKET_ID, TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, OCCUR FROM( SELECT T.TICKET_ID, T.CLUSTER_NO, T.TICKET_TYPE, T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, T.FAULT_TIME, T.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_CODE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN, T.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT, T.STATUS, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE, T.PARENT_TICKET_ID, T.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, T.OCCUR FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_CURRENT T WHERE T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME >= RCA.FC_GET_MINUS_DAY(1) AND T.STATUS != 'FIN' AND T.TICKET_TYPE = 'RT' ) A WHERE A.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS NULL

SELECT TICKET_ID, TICKET_AL_ID, ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA, ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA, ROOT_CAUSE_EQUIP_TYPEA, ROOT_CAUSE_UNITA, ROOT_CAUSE_SLOTA, ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA, ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_LEVELA, ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOZ, ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ, ROOT_CAUSE_EQUIP_TYPEZ, ROOT_CAUSE_UNITZ, ROOT_CAUSE_SLOTZ, ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ, ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_LEVELZ, ROOT_CAUSE_PTPNAMEA, ROOT_CAUSE_PTPNAMEZ FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_AL_CURRENT WHERE TICKET_ID = #{ticketId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RCA.tb_rca_ticket_current ( ticket_id, cluster_no, ticket_type, ticket_generation_time, fault_time, root_cause_type, root_cause_code, root_cause_domain, total_related_alarm_cnt, status, ticket_rca_result_code, ticket_rca_result_dtl_code, ticket_rca_result_orig_dtl_code, parent_ticket_id, occur, direction ) VALUES ( #{ticketId}, #{clusterNo}, #{ticketType}, (SELECT NOW()), #{faultTime}, #{rootCauseType}, #{rootCauseCode}, #{rootCauseDomain}, #{relatedAlarmCnt}, #{status}, #{ticketRcaResultCode}, #{ticketRcaResultDtlCode}, #{ticketRcaResultDtlCode}, #{parentTicketId}, #{occur}, #{direction} )

insert.if:
INSERT INTO RCA.tb_rca_ticket_al_current ( ticket_id, ticket_al_id, root_cause_alarm_noa, root_cause_sysnamea, root_cause_unita, root_cause_slota, root_cause_porta, root_cause_alarm_levela, root_cause_alarm_noz, root_cause_sysnamez, root_cause_unitz, root_cause_slotz, root_cause_portz, root_cause_alarm_levelz, root_cause_ptpnamea, root_cause_ptpnamez, insert_time ) VALUES
( #{item.ticketId}, (SELECT nextval('rca.seq_ticket_al')) ::VARCHAR, #{item.rootCauseAlarmNoA}, #{item.rootCauseSysnameA}, #{item.rootCauseUnitA}, (SELECT split_part(split_part(alarmloc, '-', '1'), '.', '2') FROM RCA.TB_ALARM_CUR_MST WHERE ALARMNO = #{item.rootCauseAlarmNoA} LIMIT 1), #{item.rootCausePortA}, #{item.rootCauseAlarmLevelA}, #{item.rootCauseAlarmNoZ}, #{item.rootCauseSysnameZ}, #{item.rootCauseUnitZ}, (SELECT split_part(split_part(alarmloc, '-', '1'), '.', '2') FROM RCA.TB_ALARM_CUR_MST WHERE ALARMNO = #{item.rootCauseAlarmNoZ} LIMIT 1), #{item.rootCausePortZ}, #{item.rootCauseAlarmLevelZ}, #{item.rootCausePtpnameA}, #{item.rootCausePtpnameZ}, (SELECT TICKET_GENERATION_TIME FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_CURRENT WHERE TICKET_ID = #{item.ticketId}) )

mapper.insert: insert into rca.tb_rca_ticket_cnt select T.ticket_id, (SELECT count(*) FROM rca.tb_alarm_cur_mst where clusterno IN (SELECT unnest(T2.CHILD_CLUSTERS) UNION SELECT T.cluster_no) AND alarmlevel != '1') AS TOTAL_ALARM_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT alarms) FROM ( SELECT UNNEST(AL2.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARMS) AS alarms ) ac) as RELATED_ALARM_COUNT, T2.CHILD_CNT AS CHILD_COUNT, T.ticket_generation_time AS INSERT_TIME FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current T LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT PARENT_TICKET_ID, COUNT(PARENT_TICKET_ID) AS CHILD_CNT, ARRAY_AGG(CLUSTER_NO) AS CHILD_CLUSTERS FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current WHERE parent_ticket_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY PARENT_TICKET_ID) T2 ON T2.PARENT_TICKET_ID = T.TICKET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT TICKET_ID, ARRAY_AGG(ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOA) || ARRAY_AGG(ROOT_CAUSE_ALARM_NOZ) AS TOTAL_RELATED_ALARMS FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current GROUP BY TICKET_ID) AL2 ON T.TICKET_ID = AL2.TICKET_ID where T.ticket_id = #{ticketId};
mapper.select: SELECT TICKET_ID, ticket_generation_time FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_CURRENT WHERE ticket_generation_time BETWEEN now() - interval '12 hour' AND TO_CHAR(now(),'YYYY-MM-DD' ||' 23:59:59') ::timestamp AND (status != 'AUTO_FIN' AND status != 'FIN') ORDER BY TICKET_ID DESC
SELECT HANDLING_TIME FROM RCA.tb_rca_ticket_handling_status_current WHERE TICKET_ID = #{ticket_id} ORDER BY HANDLING_TIME DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nia.tb_sop (sop_id, ticket_id, ticket_type, ticket_result, status, request_time, receive_time, detail, fault_classify, fault_type, fault_detail_content, etc_content, ai_accuracy, FAULT_TYPE_CONTENT, START_TIME, END_TIME) VALUES ( #{sopId}, #{ticketId}, #{ticketType}, #{ticketResult}, #{status}, now(), NULL, #{detail}, #{faultClassify}, #{faultType}, #{faultDetailContent}, #{etcContent}, #{aiAccuracy}, #{faultTypeContent}, #{startTime}, #{endTime} )
mapper.update: WITH UPSERT AS ( UPDATE NIA.TB_SOP SET RECEIVE_TIME = now(), STATUS = #{status}, FAULT_CLASSIFY = (case when #{faultClassify} is null then FAULT_CLASSIFY else #{faultClassify} end), FAULT_TYPE = (case when #{faultType} is null then FAULT_TYPE when #{faultType} = '' then FAULT_TYPE else #{faultType} end), FAULT_DETAIL_CONTENT = (case when #{faultDetailContent} is null then FAULT_DETAIL_CONTENT when #{faultDetailContent} = '' then FAULT_DETAIL_CONTENT else #{faultDetailContent} end), ETC_CONTENT = (case when #{etcContent} is null then ETC_CONTENT when #{etcContent} = '' then ETC_CONTENT else #{etcContent} end), AI_ACCURACY = (case when #{aiAccuracy}::varchar = 'NULL' then AI_ACCURACY when #{aiAccuracy}::varchar = '' then AI_ACCURACY else #{aiAccuracy}::varchar end), FAULT_TYPE_CONTENT = #{faultTypeContent}, START_TIME = #{startTime}, END_TIME = #{endTime} WHERE TICKET_ID = #{ticketId} RETURNING TICKET_ID ) INSERT INTO NIA.TB_SOP (SOP_ID, TICKET_ID, TICKET_TYPE, TICKET_RESULT, STATUS, REQUEST_TIME, RECEIVE_TIME, DETAIL, FAULT_CLASSIFY, FAULT_TYPE, FAULT_DETAIL_CONTENT, ETC_CONTENT, AI_ACCURACY, FAULT_TYPE_CONTENT, START_TIME, END_TIME) SELECT #{sopId}, #{ticketId}, #{ticketType}, #{ticketResult}, #{status}, now(), NULL, #{detail}, #{faultClassify}, #{faultType}, #{faultDetailContent}, #{etcContent}, #{aiAccuracy}::varchar, #{faultTypeContent}, #{startTime}, #{endTime} WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM UPSERT)
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN TICKET_ALARM_CLEAR_LIST IS NOT NULL THEN array_to_string(TICKET_ALARM_CLEAR_LIST,',','') ELSE NULL END AS CLEAR_ALARM_TICKET_LIST , IS_ALL_CLEAR FROM( SELECT IS_ALL_CLEAR, TICKET_ALARM_CLEAR_LIST FROM rca.fc_clear_ticket_check(#{ticketId}) AS t(TICKET_ALARM_CLEAR_LIST character varying[], IS_ALL_CLEAR BOOLEAN) ) A

SELECT TICKET_ID FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_CURRENT WHERE ticket_generation_time > RCA.FC_GET_MINUS_DAY(2) AND status NOT IN('AUTO_FIN','FIN') and ticket_type != 'PF' AND ticket_type != 'TRAFFIC' AND ticket_type != 'ATT' AND ticket_type != 'NTT' AND profile_title is null

SELECT TICKET_ID, CLUSTER_NO, TICKET_TYPE, TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, FAULT_TIME, ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE, ROOT_CAUSE_CODE, ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN, TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT, STATUS, TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE, TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE, TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE, PARENT_TICKET_ID, TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, OCCUR FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_CURRENT WHERE PROFILE_TITLE IS NULL AND TICKET_GENERATION_TIME > RCA.FC_GET_MINUS_DAY(7) AND ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN IN ('POTN', 'ROADM', 'SWITCH')

SELECT STRIFID as strifid, STRIFNM as ifId, STRRESID as strresid, coalesce(STRRESNM, (select node_nm from resource.tb_node_mst where node_num = strresid)) as nodeId, INTTIMESTAMP as inttimestamp FROM RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_TRAFFIC WHERE STRIFID = #{strifid} AND INTTIMESTAMP = #{inttimestamp}::int LIMIT 1

SELECT A.TICKET_ID, A.STATUS FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_CURRENT A LEFT OUTER JOIN RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_AL_CURRENT B ON A.TICKET_ID = B.TICKET_ID WHERE A.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME > (RCA.FC_GET_MINUS_DAY(1) + INTERVAL '1 day') AND A.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS NULL AND A.TICKET_TYPE = #{ticketType} AND A.STATUS NOT LIKE '%FIN%' AND B.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA = #{sysname} AND B.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA = #{port} ORDER BY TICKET_GENERATION_TIME LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(TICKET_ID) as ticket_cnt FROM RCA.TB_RCA_TICKET_CURRENT WHERE PARENT_TICKET_ID = #{ticketId}
